title: クラシックに向けた記者会見

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, a press conference is held for the first
race of the Classics—the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look at all those reporters! Hehe, I must
really be amazing, huh?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Many people are keeping tabs on your progress.
How are you feeling about the Satsuki Sho?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm totally ready to win it, of course!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm aiming to be the best racer ever, which means
I gotta be number one among my peers first!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Who would you consider your biggest rival?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Rival? Isn't that obvious? It's the student council
president, Symboli Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to the Classics, Prez is famous for
being a Triple Crown champion, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So the Satsuki Sho is just the beginning. I need to
win the Derby and the Kikuka Sho too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll be a Triple Crown champion, just like
Prez!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All the reporters seemed pretty excited! I didn't
realize how much of a big shot I am these days!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But now my heart won't stop pounding! The
Classics are already here!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I said I'm gonna be Triple Crown champion, so I
gotta train even harder than before!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm on it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...By the way, I have an idea. Do you have a
minute?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Remember when I did that partner run with Air
Groove? I want to incorporate more of those into
my training!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Only with veteran runners, though! The stronger,
the better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If there's one thing I learned from our experience
with Air Groove, it's that Teio can gain a lot from
training with such seasoned racers.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd agree!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Then I'll go find some people to race
against!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... You're so fast, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same for you—it's impressive how
well you're keeping up, seeing as you're still in
your classic year.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You know it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, don't you two make an odd couple. The
heck are ya doing?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Tamamo! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You gotta race me too! C'mon, over here! Get
into starting position!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Now hold on just a sec! The heck are ya
talkin' about?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio continues to hone her skills for the
Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm mulling over her progress while watching her
train, when...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Teio certainly seems pumped to take on the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She's done a fine job of improving her abilities
since her debut.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes... It is a far cry from when she forgot herself
and was merely obsessed with blind longing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Where she was once a mere spectator clapping
along, she has now climbed down onto the turf,
chasing after me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And she says she's planning on becoming a Triple
Crown champion too. Hehe... She truly has come
quite far.
choice_data_list: You've got your eye on her.
You've got your eye on her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I suppose so...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have long made it my mission to create a world
where all Umamusume can achieve true
happiness.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
At first, I kept watch out of concern that she may
choose to live in my shadow, rather than pursue
the true pinnacle that all racers should seek.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But now...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"I'm going to become the king of kings, a
Monarch to surpass even the almighty Emperor!"

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
When Teio proclaimed that to me—when I saw
that burning ferocity in her eyes—a flame was lit
in my own heart.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: A flame that burns strong even now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As the Emperor, I wish for her happiness. But
under the veil... deep down...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I've been waiting... for someone like
Teio.
choice_data_list: I'll make sure she surpasses you.
I'll make sure she surpasses you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha... Well, be sure I'll put up quite a fight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf awaits on the highest of peaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Tokai Teio will break through the
Classics and follow her no matter what may lie
ahead!
